arts.ttl: Croatia, Denmark qualify for Nations League quarterfinals with draws
arts.sum: Denmark and Croatia qualified for the Nations League quarterfinals after both sides secured draws on Monday. Northern Ireland and Romania will step up to League B after topping their groups.

arts.ttl: Croatia 1-1 Portugal - Seleção stay unbeaten in the UEFA Nations League
arts.sum: Portugal remained undefeated in the UEFA Nations League after a 1-1 draw in Croatia. João Félix opened the scoring in Split before the hosts staged a second half fight back, Joško Gvardiol equalising in the 65th minute. The game was significant for the Seleção as Tomás Araújo, Tiago Djaló and Fábio Silva made their senior debuts in Fernando Gomes' last games as president of the Portuguese Football Federation. Match report to follow... Line Ups Croatia (3-4-3): D. Livaković - J. Šutalo, D. Ćaleta-Car, J. Gvardiol - I. Perišić (L. Sučić 58’), L. Modrić (N. Moro 78’), M. Kovačić (Mario Pašalić 46’), B. Sosa (K. Jakić 46’) - A. Kramarić, I. Matanović (A. Budimir 63’), M. Baturina Unused Substitutes: M. Pjaca, N. Vlašić, M. Pongračić, D. Kotarski, I. Ivušić, Marco Pašalić, M. Oršić Portugal (3-4-3): José Sá - Tomás Araújo (Tiago Djaló 63’), Renato Veiga, Nuno Mendes (Diogo Dalot 81’) - Nélson Semedo, João Neves, Vitinha, João Cancelo – Otávio (Francisco Conceição 71’), João Félix, Rafael Leão (Fábio Silva 71’) Unused Substitutes: Rui Silva, António Silva, Samú Costa, Trincão, Geovany Quenda Goals [0-1] João Félix, 33’ [1-1] Josko Gvardiol, 65’

arts.ttl: Croatia 1-1 Portugal: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Josko Gvardiol saves the day to ensure Croatia progress
arts.sum: Croatia come from behind to draw 1-1 with Portugal in Split on Monday evening, ensuring the hosts progress into the Nations League quarter-finals in second place.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo shows off new Ray-Ban glasses with embedded camera and microphone in new video as legendary footballer continues his venture into content creation
arts.sum: The glasses allow for recordings to be made from the frame, donning a built-in camera and microphone to allow for high-quality recordings to be made and shared to social media.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo claims his next podcast guest will 'break the internet' in teasing video featuring former Man United team-mate Rio Ferdinand
arts.sum: The 39-year-old Real Madrid and Manchester United legend launched his YouTube channel, 'UR Cristiano', in August and has already gained more than 67million subscribers.

arts.ttl: Man City injuries: Phil Foden, Manuel Akanji, Ruben Dias return dates and latest news
arts.sum: City are looking to bounce back after losing four matches in a row in all competitions

arts.ttl: Liverpool injuries: Trent Alexander-Arnold, Diogo Jota, Alisson return dates and latest news
arts.sum: Several regular starters are out for Arne Slot’s team with big games fast approaching

arts.ttl: Portugal XI vs Croatia – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Portugal take on Croatia in the UEFA Nations League with progress to the quarter-finals already assured. Roberto Martinez’s side wrapped up top spot in the group with a 5-1 thrashing of Poland on Friday, in a fixture that saw Cristiano Ronaldo score twice. arts.ttl: Croatia vs Portugal – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Croatia welcome group winners Portugal to Split this evening in the final fixture of their Nations League group. The home side are in pole position to progress to the quarter-finals alongside tonight’s opponents, but are at risk of missing out if results do not go in their favour. Croatia will be assured of a place […] The post Croatia vs Portugal – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Why is Cristiano Ronaldo not playing for Portugal against Croatia today in the Nations League?
arts.sum: Al Nassr forward Cristiano Ronaldo will play no part in Portugal’s Nations League game against Croatia tonight at Stadion Poljud in Split. “The game against Croatia is important, we need to look at other players .
